code:
import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
mut sorted: List<Int> = []
for tok in tokens
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(n)
    if not list.contains(sorted, n)
      mut inserted: List<Int> = []
      mut placed = false
      for x in sorted
        if not placed and n < x
          inserted = list.push(inserted, n)
          placed = true
        end
        inserted = list.push(inserted, x)
      end
      if not placed
        inserted = list.push(inserted, n)
      end
      sorted = inserted
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut result = ""
mut first = true
for x in sorted
  if first
    result = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    result = "#{result} #{x}"
  end
end
println(result)
